subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated February 14, 1919, hath been received. Praise be to God, it testifieth to spirituality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما بتاریخ ۱۴ شباط ۱۹۱۹ رسید الحمد لله دلالت بر روحانیت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
